content: Coggan 7 zones: Z1 <55%, Z2 56-75%, Z3 76-90%, Z4 91-105%, Z5 106-120%, Z6 121-150%, Z7 >150% of FTP. Common mistakes: off-by-one on boundary (use < not <= for upper bound), treating boundaries as sharp lines rather than fuzzy guides, and failing to recompute zones when FTP changes. Zone 3 'grey zone' trap: drifting into Z3 on easy days is the most common beginner mistake.
